column1:
Disclaimer: Article 58.1(a) of MiFID II requires trading venues to publish weekly reports of the open interest and participant numbers and categories for certain products listed on their exchanges. To be included in the report a product needs to have at least twenty participants, and where it has a deliverable supply the open interest needs to exceed four times its monthly deliverable supply. The report’s detail is defined by Article 83 of Regulation 2017/65 and Regulation 2017/1093. The Exchanges have published a summary of the position holder category determination here.
To comply with these regulations the Exchanges require their Members to provide the necessary information to the Exchange. The nature of the information required prevents it from being completely reconciled and checked against other trading and clearing information available to the Exchanges. Accordingly, it is not possible for the Exchanges to validate all of the information used in the preparation of these reports although the Exchanges do check the data where possible. Where an error is identified the reporting party is required to resubmit their information which will result in the report affected being republished.

In determining whether to rely on any report, users should note that these reports are published as received from Members. The Exchanges do not accept any responsibility for any loss incurred from a reliance on the report.
